top_signals.title: The White House is dictating access to frontier AI models, shifting power from tech giants
top_signals.summary: The Trump administration is taking steps to control who gets access to the latest frontier models, sources familiar with the matter told CNBC.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Baker Tilly Eyes $3 Billion in Debt to Replace Private Credit
top_signals.summary: Deutsche Bank AG is preparing to sell about $3 billion in debt markets for accounting services firm Baker Tilly Advisory Group to refinance private credit loans, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_signals.title: Taco Bell says it has removed lettuce linked to cyclosporiasis outbreak from its restaurants
top_signals.summary: Taco Bell, which the CDC linked to the cyclosporiasis outbreak, will likely recover soon from the health safety scare, according to analysts.
